case_title: MARIN, SERGIO G. vs. SHERWOOD ELLIOTT,ETAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIN, SERGIO G. AS TO DEFENDANT SHERWOOD ELLIOTT,INDIVIDUALLY & DBA SHERWOOD ELLIOTT STEAM CLEANING

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIN, SERGIO G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHERWOOD ELLIOTT,INDIVIDUALLY & DBA SHERWOOD ELLIOTT STEAM CLEANING $267.95 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $347.95

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $15.35 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER,STATE OF CALIFORNIA
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHERWOOD ELLIOTT,INDIVIDUALLY & DBA SHERWOOD ELLIOTT STEAM CLEANING
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MARIN, SERGIO G.
